summary: Iteration 15: Code quality refactoring regression test. Fixed critical Trash2 undefined error in Dashboard.jsx (missing icon import after DealRow extraction). All 9 backend tests pass. Dashboard renders correctly with DealRow component, DetailPanel opens with all 4 categorize buttons. deal-stage-section is fund-only (expected). SyncLogModal trigger (sync-log-btn) only renders when lastSynced is available.

ui_bugs.issue: Trash2 icon missing from lucide-react import after DealRow extraction — caused ReferenceError: Trash2 is not defined, crashing entire Dashboard. FIXED by T1.

action_items: The review request mentioned data-testid='sync-stats' but actual code uses data-testid='sync-log-btn' (only visible when lastSynced is set). Minor naming discrepancy — no action needed unless spec requires changing.

deal-stage-section only renders in fund context (inFund=true). Test user is not in a fund, so it won't render for solo users — this is expected behavior per the conditional check in DetailPanel.jsx line 150.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx: When extracting DealRow to its own component, Trash2 was left in Dashboard.jsx usage (lines 343, 518, 536) but not re-imported after the refactor. Always audit icon imports after component extraction.
sync-log-btn testid in docs/review_request says sync-stats but actual testid is sync-log-btn — documentation should be updated.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Dashboard loads, DealRow works, CategorizeDealSection all 4 buttons found; Trash2 import bug fixed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Trash2 import bug fixed in Dashboard.jsx. All backend APIs healthy. Dashboard loads with 4 test deals. CategorizeDealSection buttons (action-add-pipeline, action-mark-reviewed, action-pass, action-archive) all present. DealStageSection requires fund context to render. SyncLogModal trigger testid is sync-log-btn (not sync-stats). conftest.py has proper dict[str,str] return type hint. server.py has all 3 helper functions.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: During component extraction refactoring of Dashboard.jsx → DealRow.jsx, the Trash2 icon was imported inside DealRow.jsx correctly. However, Dashboard.jsx still uses Trash2 directly in 3 other places (archived deals section, bulk actions area) and the original Trash2 import was removed from Dashboard's lucide-react import block as part of cleanup. Fix: Add Trash2 back to Dashboard.jsx lucide-react imports.
